title: Front Office Manager - OYO Rooms - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - OYO Rooms - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Front Office Manager with drive and ambition, OYO Rooms in Varanasi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About OYO Rooms:
OYO Rooms is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Travel Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with OYO Rooms!
